name: VibeVoice
readme_excerpt: - ⭐️ VibeVoice-ASR is natively multilingual, supporting over 50 languages — check the supported languages for details. - 🔥 The VibeVoice-ASR finetuning code is now available! - ⚡️ **vLLM inference** is now supported for faster inference; see vllm-asr for more details. - 📑 VibeVoice-ASR Technique Report is available.

name: skills
description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
readme_excerpt: My agent skills that I use every day to do real engineering - not vibe coding.

name: GitNexus
description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
readme_excerpt: **⚠️ Important Notice:** GitNexus has NO official cryptocurrency, token, or coin. Any token/coin using the GitNexus name on Pump.fun or any other platform is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or created by** this project or its maintainers. Do not purchase any cryptocurrency claiming association with GitNexus.

name: awesome-codex-skills
description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.
readme_excerpt: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.

name: hackingtool
description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers

name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
readme_excerpt: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

name: claude-code-templates
description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code
readme_excerpt: **Ready-to-use configurations for Anthropic's Claude Code.** A comprehensive collection of AI agents, custom commands, settings, hooks, external integrations (MCPs), and project templates to enhance your development workflow.

name: claude-context
description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
readme_excerpt: **Claude Context** is an MCP plugin that adds semantic code search to Claude Code and other AI coding agents, giving them deep context from your entire codebase.

name: GhostTrack
description: Useful tool to track location or mobile number
readme_excerpt: Useful tool to track location or mobile number, so this tool can be called osint or also information gathering

name: FinceptTerminal
description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
readme_excerpt: State-of-the-art financial intelligence platform with CFA-level analytics, AI automation, and unlimited data connectivity.

name: ace-step-ui
description: 🎵 The Ultimate Open Source Suno Alternative - Professional UI for ACE-Step 1.5 AI Music Generation. Free, local, unlimited. Stop paying for Suno!
readme_excerpt: **Tired of paying $10+/month for Suno or Udio?** ACE-Step 1.5 is the **open source Suno killer** that runs locally on your own GPU - and ACE-Step UI gives you a **beautiful, professional interface** to harness its full power.

name: Pixelle-Video
description: 🚀 AI 全自动短视频引擎 | AI Fully Automated Short Video Engine

name: public-apis
description: A collective list of free APIs
readme_excerpt: The Public APIs repository is manually curated by community members like you and folks working at APILayer. It includes an extensive list of public APIs from many domains that you can use for your own products. Consider it a treasure trove of APIs well-managed by the community over the years.

name: Open-Generative-AI
description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

name: ds2api
description: Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.
readme_excerpt: 将 DeepSeek Web 对话能力转换为 OpenAI、Claude 与 Gemini 兼容 API。后端为 **Go 全量实现**，前端为 React WebUI 管理台（源码在 webui/，部署时自动构建到 static/admin）。

name: GenericAgent
description: Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption
readme_excerpt: **GenericAgent** is a minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework. Its core is just **~3K lines of code**. Through **9 atomic tools + a ~100-line Agent Loop**, it grants any LLM system-level control over a local computer — covering browser, terminal, filesystem, keyboard/mouse input, screen vision, and mobile devices (ADB).

name: free-claude-code
description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like openclaw
readme_excerpt: Use Claude Code CLI, VS Code, JetBrains ACP, or chat bots through your own Anthropic-compatible proxy.

name: system-design-primer
description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview.  Includes Anki flashcards.
